name: ᚦ Thurisaz
flowText: Thurisaz is the thunder-thorn — the jolt that makes a clear edge.

kabbalah: Geburah striking Binah’s wall (Peh ↔ Tau axis)

overview.label: Kabbalah
overview.value: Geburah striking Binah’s wall (Peh ↔ Tau axis)

items.label: Kabbalah
items.value: Geburah striking Binah’s wall (Peh ↔ Tau axis)

related.name: ♂ Mars
related.teaser: Mars is the blade of fire — spear of will, tower’s flame, the storm of courage.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: ♄ Saturn
related.teaser: Saturn is the black mountain — the ring of time, stern father, weight of law.

related.name: ♈ Aries
related.teaser: Aries is the spear of beginnings — flame of will, thrust of courage, the primal strike.

related.name: Onyx
related.teaser: Root is the bedrock, the earth’s embrace — anchoring the soul into form.

related.name: Obsidian
related.teaser: Root is the bedrock, the earth’s embrace — anchoring the soul into form.

related.name: XVI. The Tower
related.teaser: The Tower is the strike of lightning, shattering false structures — liberation through destruction.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: ᚾ Nauthiz
related.teaser: Nauthiz is the narrow pass — the wise pressure that forges character.

related.name: Ares
related.teaser: Ares is a spark that purifies — Spear; under Mars; in Aries; with XVI The Tower.

related.name: IV. The Emperor
related.teaser: The Emperor is the throne of flame — law of fire seated on the bones of the earth.
